title: Axel Schneider
text:
I am a predoctoral researcher at Cornell University where I work with Christopher B. Barrett and Jenny C. Aker. My research in applied economics lies at the intersection of development economics and network theory.
Before that, I was a field-based predoctoral researcher at the Local Government Revenue Initiative (LoGRI) at the University of Toronto, working with Wilson Prichard. My work there centered around political economy and tax systems, and I supported the implementation of tax reforms.
My work has taken me to Sierra Leone, Togo, Kenya, and Senegal, where I have conducted field research.

title: Axel Schneider
text:
Experience
Predoctoral Research Fellow, Cornell University (CIDER) 2025-now
Predoctoral Research Fellow, University of Toronto (LoGRI) 2023-2025
Short-Term Consultant, World Bank (Development Research Group) 2025
